---
title: "Nagasawa Kanae: A Sonoma Valley Live Shaped by a Global Turning Point"
description: "Nagasawa Kanae (1852-1934) was born a samurai but spent nearly his entire adult life in Santa Rosa"
date: 2026-06-27
image: /images/nagasawa_boy.png
image-alt: "Kanae Nagasawa as a boy c. 1865"
categories: [japanese]
---

<a href="/files/annadel_neighbors_nagasawa.pdf">Download pdf</a>


Laurent, B. Nagasawa Kanae: A Sonoma Valley Live Shaped by a Global Turning Point. Annadel Neighbors 9 (2026)


```{=html}
<iframe src="/files/annadel_neighbors_nagasawa.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;"></iframe>
```
